name: Creme Semisweet Chocolate Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate chips and butter in the top of a double boiler over boiling water.
2. Gradually add evaporated milk and stir until smooth.
3. Allow to cool to room temperature.
4. Add marshmallow cream and beat until smooth.
Yield: Frosting for sides and tops of 8 or 9 inch layer cake.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/20 of Cake, 1/2 Fat Exchange, CAL: 1/20 of Cake, 23; 1/24 of Cake, 2/5 Fat Exchange, CAL: 19.
